errors.cannot_view_tier: You cannot view an admin of this tier.
errors.cannot_edit_self: You cannot edit your own account here. Use Profile instead.
errors.cannot_manage_tier: You cannot manage an admin of this tier.
errors.cannot_grant_permission: You cannot grant a permission you do not hold: {{permission}}
errors.invalid_admin_type: You cannot assign this admin type.

admins.title: Admins
admins.subtitle: Manage staff access and portal permissions.
admins.create_help: Create a new admin account and assign its module access.
admins.edit_help: Update account details, locale, and per-module permissions.
admins.view_help: This admin is visible to you, but it cannot be changed from admin management.
admins.view_self_help: Use Profile to update your own account settings.
admins.password_placeholder: Leave blank to keep the current password
admins.permissions_help: Choose the highest access level allowed for each module.
admins.permissions_modal_help: Review this admin's current module access in read-only mode.
admins.implicit_permissions_help: This admin type receives full access automatically.
admins.implicit_permissions_note: Per-module permissions only apply to the Admin tier.
admins.confirm_delete: Delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Review runtime settings and edit their current values.
settings.upload_replace_hint: Upload a new file to replace the saved value.
settings.asset_will_clear: The current file will be cleared when you save.

errors.invalid_number: Enter a valid number before saving.
errors.upload_not_allowed: This setting does not accept file uploads.

pages.title: Pages
pages.subtitle: Manage localized rich-content pages with cover images.
pages.create_help: Create a localized page with rich content and an optional cover image.
pages.edit_help: Update localized content, cover image, and slug for this page.
pages.view_help: Review this page in read-only mode.
pages.confirm_delete: Delete {{slug}}? This action cannot be undone.
pages.load_failed: The page could not be loaded.
pages.cover_save_failed: The page was saved, but the cover image could not be updated.
pages.cover_will_remove: The current cover will be removed when you save.
pages.cover_upload_hint: Upload a single image to use as this page's cover.
pages.system_slug_hint: System page slugs are locked and cannot be changed.
pages.slug_hint: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

sections.page_help: Define the page slug and review system-page protections.
sections.content_help: Write each locale's title and rich HTML content.
sections.cover_help: Add a single cover image attachment for this page.

errors.system_slug_locked: System page slugs cannot be changed.
errors.cover_must_be_image: Please upload an image for the page cover.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to upload files to this folder.
errors.invalid_folder: The selected upload folder is invalid.
errors.kind_not_allowed: This folder does not accept that upload kind.
